title: gonolobus pubiflorus
intro: Gonolobus pubiflorus, also known as the wild yam or Gonolobus vine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gonolobus pubiflorus include relief from pain and menstrual cramps, as well as improved digestion and immune function. Herbal preparations of Gonolobus pubiflorus can be made by drying the roots and leaves, and then using them to make teas, infusions, or tinctures.
